flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Knox College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (64.5% → 49.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Knox College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.6k → $57.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Knox College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.6k → $57.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Knox College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (67.5% vs 74.0%).
